turns.user_message: I tried listening to my favorite music to cheer up, but it didn't work. It just sounded like noise today.
I keep trying things that should make me feel something, and nothing sticks. It's like my feelings are just out of reach.
I feel like I'm trying to grasp at smoke, and everything good just slips through. Nothing I do brings any color back.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
